_provenance.note: PLP 2-year and PLEXOS-2026-05-17 cases both model the same SEN backbone (245 / 251 transmission buses) and neither contains the ~10 new distribution substations in the spreadsheet. Resolution used three tiers: (a) DIRECT match for the 3 subs already in the PLP/PLEXOS case (Maitencillo, Don Goyo, El Cobre); (b) BFS through the Infotecnica /v1/lineas graph for two cases where the connection chain resolves cleanly to a PLP bus (Peñablanca→Miraflores110, San Carlos→Parral154); (c) regional proxy for the remaining 8 (Mariscal, Nueva Panquehue, Graneros, Negrete, Campo Lindo, Chimbarongo, Loica). Each entry’s description carries the Infotecnica substation name + the resolution rationale.
